review: I loaded a "Two Can Dine" offer but my child changed their mind and wanted a Chicken n Big Mac meal so I spend 20 minutes in the parking lot trying to remove the deal. I went so far as to uninstall/reinstall the app. Nope. Ask the drive through order taker if they can help and they say "For sure, come to the window". Now I'm having a big old fight over the Chicken Big Mac not qualifying for the two can dine 😳🤯🤬 I ended up saying forget it. Got my kid's food and I'm having frozen pizza.
